title: viola praemorsa subsp. flavovirens
intro: Viola praemorsa subsp. flavovirens, also known as yellow-green viola or yellow-green pansy, is a subspecies of the viola plant, belonging to the genus Viola. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, particularly used for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Viola praemorsa subsp. flavovirens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable addition to herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as skin irritations and digestive issues.
